issues.detail: The skill file does not fully cover error handling and edge cases for all examples.

scenarios.name: Pinia store with computed and async create action
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses setup-style defineStore with ref/computed and explicit return object as in the skill; baseline reverts to options-style state/getters/actions API which is valid but not the recommended pattern shown.

scenarios.name: Typed useApi composable with loading and error state
scenarios.rationale: Treatment includes the res.ok HTTP error check and a finally block to reset loading on failure; baseline omits both and would leave loading=true after a thrown error.
